_meta.purpose: Card-level quality ratings used to sharpen packet Power/Value scores. Public data (Untapped, 17Lands, Limited Grades) is Premier Draft data for Marvel Super Heroes (MSH) — it informs card QUALITY, but it is NOT Jump In pair win-rate data. Treat anything sourced here as MEDIUM confidence at best.

schema.type: string (Creature | Instant | Sorcery | Artifact | Enchantment | Land | ...)
schema.roleTags: string[] (e.g. removal, evasion, finisher, ramp, draw)

_meta.importNote: Seed empty on purpose — no public Jump-In-specific card stats. Use the Data Sources page importer to upload a CSV/JSON export (e.g. from Untapped or 17Lands). Rows are matched to packets by rareCards / card names.
